set security zones security-zone trust address-book address db-supernet 10.2.0.0/16
set security policies from-zone dmz to-zone trust policy allow-db-broader-subnet match source-address app-servers
set security policies from-zone dmz to-zone trust policy allow-db-broader-subnet match destination-address db-supernet
set security policies from-zone dmz to-zone trust policy allow-db-broader-subnet match application app-mysql
set security policies from-zone dmz to-zone trust policy allow-db-broader-subnet then permit
